message:
test(demo): regenerate snapshots after chrome overhaul and bocpd updates

Snapshot updates across all accessibility modes, demo pages, and overlay
configurations to reflect the chrome rendering changes and BOCPD regime
detector improvements made in prior commits. Also includes minor chrome.rs
refinements and bocpd.rs updates from concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
